entry.title: New: CR 24-102 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending FIRST READING of Bill 140, CD1 (2024), to authorize the Mayor to enter into an intergovernmental agreement with the 15th Space Surveillance Squadron, Air Force Maui Optical & Supercomputing, and Air Force Research Laboratory to detail the firefighting, emergency and non-emergency services, and hazardous materials incident response provided by the Department of Fire and Public Safety for the protection of specified military facilities on Maui.

Budget, Finance, and Economic Development Committee (2023-2025)

View on the council site
